name: Snake-Eyes Flamberge Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇眼の炎龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スネークアイズ・フランベルジュ・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field or in either GY; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell on the field; Special Summon it to your field. If this card is sent from the hand or field to the GY: You can Special Summon 2 Level 1 FIRE monsters from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eyes Flamberge Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field or in either GY; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell on the field; Special Summon it to your field. If this card is sent from the hand or field to the GY: You can Special Summon 2 Level 1 FIRE monsters from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eyes Flamberge Dragon" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field or in either GY; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell on the field; Special Summon it to your field. If this card is sent from the hand or field to the GY: You can Special Summon 2 Level 1 FIRE monsters from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eyes Flamberge Dragon" once per turn.

action: Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from field in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from the opponent's field in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
Special Summons from your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone to your field
